---
title: "Alice Weber"
---

## Alice Weber

**Dates:** (1844-1931)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874-93), novelist

### Biography

In the 1881 census she is an authoress living with a widowed mother, teacher sister and bank clerk brother in Paddington;  in 1888 she is at at 10 Randolph Road Maida Vale.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]
- Letter from Jany 31st 1877
- Letter from Decr 29th [1873?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
